title: aeranthes disticha
intro: Aeranthes disticha is a species of orchid, commonly known as the 'double-lobed orchid' due to its unique floral structure. The medicinal properties of Aeranthes disticha are attributed to its ability to lower fever, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Its health benefits include helping to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as acting as an anti-diarrheal agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be consumed for its medicinal properties.
